headline: The Complete Calvin and Hobbes is a great last-minute Father’s Day gift
summary: This collection is a perfect last-minute Father's Day gift. It includes every beloved strip from Bill Watterson's ten-year run. A nostalgic treasure for any comic strip fan.

headline: All the latest news on Android 17, Wear OS 7, and Android XR
summary: Android 17 introduces new 'Bubble' app windows and a 50/50 gaming mode. Wear OS 7 offers Live Updates and enhanced smartwatch battery life. Google is also preparing for future Android XR smart glasses.

headline: Android 17 arrives on Pixel phones today
summary: Google is rolling out Android 17 to compatible Pixel phones starting today. The update includes additional exclusive features via the June Pixel Drop. Not all announced features are immediately available.

headline: Google launches Wear OS 7 with Live Updates and a battery life boost
summary: Wear OS 7 is now rolling out to Pixel Watch 2, 3, and 4 devices. It introduces Live Updates for real-time event tracking on your smartwatch. The update also delivers a significant boost in battery life.

headline: Kingdom Hearts Collection 1-3 Is Now Available To Preorder, Out in October
summary: The Kingdom Hearts Collection 1-3 is now open for preorders. Secure your copy ahead of its official release. The collection launches on October 8th.

headline: Leviticus Review
summary: 'Leviticus' is lauded as another standout Australian horror film. Joe Bird, known from 'Talk to Me,' delivers a compelling performance. The review highlights its impact within the genre.

headline: The Tiny Firebat A6 Ryzen 7 7735HS Mini PC Is a Complete Windows 11 System for Just $282
summary: Get the Tiny Firebat A6 Ryzen 7 7735HS Mini PC for just $282. This complete Windows 11 system includes 16GB DDR5 RAM and a 512GB SSD. It features an integrated Radeon 680M iGPU.

headline: Save $100 Off a Pair of BowFlex Results Series SelectTech Dumbbells Ahead of Amazon Prime Day
summary: Save $100 on BowFlex SelectTech Dumbbells in a pre-Prime Day deal. These adjustable dumbbells can still arrive by Father's Day. Take advantage of this limited-time offer.

headline: Russian warship fires warning shots near UK-registered yacht in Channel
summary: A Russian warship fired warning shots near a UK-registered yacht. The incident occurred in the English Channel. The yacht had reportedly drifted towards the Russian frigate Admiral Grigorovich.

headline: UK forces face operational cuts without more cash, defence chief warns
summary: The UK's defence chief warns of severe operational cuts without increased funding. Former defence secretary highlights enemies don't adhere to Treasury timetables. Concerns rise over the readiness and capabilities of UK forces.

headline: Tehran selling deal with US as victory – but for Iranians it was necessity
summary: Tehran frames its deal with the US as a national victory. For many Iranians, it's a vital necessity. Citizens hope it will lower prices and reduce the fear of war.

headline: Three reasons ships are not going through the Strait of Hormuz yet
summary: Significant obstacles are preventing normal shipping traffic in the Strait of Hormuz. Experts cite persistent security concerns and lingering mines. High tolls are also deterring commercial vessels.
